mapper.select: SELECT sl.id, sl.title, sl.pic, sl.style, sl.introduction FROM song_sheet sl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_sheet_id, COUNT(*) AS collect_count FROM collect WHERE song_sheet_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY song_sheet_id ) c ON c.song_sheet_id = sl.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_sheet_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM comment WHERE song_sheet_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY song_sheet_id ) cm ON cm.song_sheet_id = sl.id ORDER BY (COALESCE(c.collect_count, 0) * 0.7 + COALESCE(cm.comment_count, 0) * 0.3) DESC, sl.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.id AS id, s.title AS title, s.pic AS pic, s.style AS style, s.introduction AS introduction, t.cnt AS collectCount FROM ( SELECT song_sheet_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM collect WHERE type = 1 AND song_sheet_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY song_sheet_id ) t INNER JOIN song_sheet s ON s.id = t.song_sheet_id ORDER BY t.cnt DESC, s.id ASC LIMIT 30
